commentary_text: The model favors Uzbekistan at 46%, while the sportsbook consensus favors DR Congo at 52%—a 29-percentage-point gap on the DR Congo win outcome. The model assigns the draw substantially higher at 30% versus the market's 24%. These divergences could reflect differing assessments of recent form or squad availability, factors the statistical model may not fully capture if injuries or lineup changes have occurred since its last update. The dashboard flags this split between model and market consensus as a significant signal worth monitoring, without endorsing either view as the sounder forecast.
